tasks.title: Analyze existing IELTS Journey website and extension codebase and UX/UI
tasks.description: Inspect the current project structure, website routes, pages, components, styles, theme system, extension popup, content scripts, background/service worker, storage, and styles. Identify weak UX/UI areas, hard-coded design values, duplicated UI/components between website and extension. Produce a detailed analysis report highlighting areas for redesign and refactor.
acceptanceCriteria: Comprehensive analysis report covering website and extension UX/UI weaknesses
List of hard-coded design values and duplicated components
Identification of theme/design token system status
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed analysis report documenting current UX/UI issues, hard-coded styles, duplicated components, and theme system status for both website and extension.

outputPlan.description: Updated analysis report with UX/UI weaknesses and design system audit

metadata.inputContext: Existing project source code and UI
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational understanding of current UX/UI and design system issues to guide redesign.

tasks.title: Design and implement a centralized theme and design token system for website and extension
tasks.description: Create or improve a centralized theme and design token system to unify colors, typography, spacing, border radius, shadows, z-index, breakpoints, and animation durations. Support light mode, dark mode, and future custom themes. Refactor existing styles to use semantic tokens instead of hard-coded values. Ensure the system is reusable by both website and extension UI components.
acceptanceCriteria: Centralized theme/design token system implemented and integrated
No hard-coded colors, spacing, fonts, or shadows remain in UI components
Both website and extension use the shared theme tokens consistently
tasks.expectedResult: A maintainable, scalable theme system used consistently across website and extension with no hard-coded style values.

outputPlan.description: Centralized theme and design token definitions
CSS variables and theme styles using design tokens
Extension styles using shared theme tokens

metadata.inputContext: Analysis report on current hard-coded styles and theme system
evidence: no hard-coded styles in UI components
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Establishes a unified design foundation for consistent styling across website and extension.

tasks.title: Refactor and create reusable UI components using the shared design system
tasks.description: Refactor existing UI components and create new reusable components such as Button, IconButton, Card, Badge, Input, SearchInput, Modal, Drawer, Toast, ProgressBar, ProgressRing, EmptyState, LoadingSkeleton, SkillCard, AITutorMessageCard, StudyTaskCard, VocabularyWordCard, DashboardSection, MobileBottomNavigation, ExtensionPopupCard, ExtensionActionMenu, ExtensionSelectedTextMenu, and ExtensionSyncStatusBadge. Ensure all components use the centralized theme tokens and follow the modern, friendly, and mobile-first design principles.
acceptanceCriteria: All reusable UI components use theme tokens and consistent styling
Components are documented and tested
Components support light and dark modes
Components are responsive and mobile-friendly
tasks.expectedResult: A library of reusable, theme-based UI components shared by website and extension, enabling consistent and maintainable UI development.

outputPlan.description: Refactored Button component using theme tokens
Refactored Card component with rounded corners and spacing
New reusable component for extension selected text action menu
Progress ring component for progress visualization

metadata.inputContext: Centralized theme system and analysis of existing UI components
evidence: components render correctly in storybook or tests
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a consistent, maintainable UI component foundation for website and extension redesign.

tasks.title: Redesign and implement the IELTS Journey website dashboard and main learning pages
tasks.description: Redesign the website dashboard and main learning pages including Landing Page, Onboarding, Dashboard, Today's Study Plan, AI Tutor Chat, AI Study Plan Generator, Full Study Roadmap, Vocabulary Notebook, Vocabulary Review, Saved Articles, Saved Text, Reading Practice, Listening Practice, Writing Practice, Speaking Practice, Mistake Review, Learning Progress, AI Progress Review, Settings, AI Provider Settings, Extension Connection Page, Empty, Loading, and Error states. Use the shared reusable components and theme system. Ensure the dashboard feels like a personalized learning command center with friendly greeting, target band, exam countdown, study streak, skill progress cards, vocabulary review reminders, AI Tutor recommendations, and quick actions. Follow mobile-first design and the reference design inspiration.
acceptanceCriteria: Website pages redesigned with modern, friendly, and consistent UI
Dashboard includes all required elements with clear visual hierarchy
Mobile-first responsive layouts implemented
Empty, loading, and error states improved with friendly messages and actions
AI Tutor UI integrated visibly and accessibly
No hard-coded styles, all use theme tokens
Existing website features remain functional
tasks.expectedResult: A fully redesigned IELTS Journey website with a polished, modern, personalized UX/UI consistent with the design system and reference inspiration.

outputPlan.description: Redesigned Dashboard page with personalized learning command center
Redesigned Landing page with modern, friendly style
Redesigned Onboarding flow with personalized education experience
Improved AI Tutor chat UI with friendly cards and proactive messages
Improved empty states with friendly messages and clear actions

metadata.inputContext: Reusable UI components and theme system
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Transforms the website into a modern, personalized IELTS learning platform with improved UX/UI.

tasks.title: Redesign and implement the IELTS Journey browser extension popup and content script UI
tasks.description: Redesign the extension popup UI and content script UI including extension popup, vocabulary list, vocabulary detail view, read/pronunciation button, AI Tutor entry point, selected text action menu, save vocabulary flow, save selected text flow, explain selected text flow, simplify selected text flow, save article flow, YouTube/video helper UI, auto-highlight saved words, vocabulary review entry point, pending review count, logged-out state, loading state, empty state, error state, settings shortcut, and sync status. Use the shared reusable components and theme system. Ensure the extension popup is compact, scrollable, fast, touch-friendly, and visually consistent with the website. Ensure content script UI is safe, isolated, and does not break host websites.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension popup UI redesigned with modern, friendly, and consistent style
Content script UI uses isolated root or Shadow DOM and scoped styles
Extension popup is compact, scrollable, and touch-friendly
Auto-highlight feature implemented safely with theme tokens
Selected text action menu is small, fast, non-intrusive, and beautiful
Extension features remain functional and do not break host websites
No hard-coded styles, all use theme tokens
tasks.expectedResult: A polished, safe, and consistent IELTS Journey browser extension UI that feels like a mini learning companion connected to the website.

outputPlan.description: Redesigned extension popup UI with friendly dashboard and quick actions
Redesigned selected text action menu with compact and safe UI
Implemented safe auto-highlight of saved vocabulary using theme tokens

metadata.inputContext: Reusable UI components and theme system
evidence: extension popup tested for responsiveness and usability
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Creates a polished, safe, and consistent extension UI tightly integrated with the website experience.

tasks.title: Implement mobile-first responsive improvements for website and extension
tasks.description: Improve mobile experience for the website and extension including bottom navigation, touch targets, responsive cards, chat popup behavior, study plan layout, vocabulary review layout, practice screen layout, progress charts, settings layout, modal/drawer behavior, form inputs, and page spacing. Ensure the website does not feel like a squeezed desktop site and the extension popup is touch-friendly and scrollable within typical popup sizes.
acceptanceCriteria: Website layouts adapt smoothly to mobile screen sizes
Extension popup is touch-friendly and scrollable on mobile devices
Touch targets meet accessibility guidelines
No layout breakage or overflow on small screens
Mobile navigation and modals behave correctly
tasks.expectedResult: Mobile-first responsive improvements applied to website and extension, providing excellent usability on mobile devices.

outputPlan.description: Improved mobile bottom navigation with touch-friendly targets
Responsive study plan layout for mobile
Extension popup scroll and touch improvements

evidence: no UI breakage on small screens
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures excellent mobile usability and consistent experience across devices.

tasks.title: Improve empty, loading, and error states for website and extension
tasks.description: Redesign and improve empty, loading, and error states across website and extension. Use friendly messages, short explanations, clear action buttons, optional icons or illustrations, skeleton loading cards, retry buttons for errors, and clear sync/error status in extension. Ensure states are consistent with the design system and product tone.
acceptanceCriteria: Empty states provide helpful guidance and clear calls to action
Loading states use skeletons or spinners consistent with theme
Error states show retry options and clear error messages
Extension shows clear sync and error status badges
States are visually consistent across website and extension
tasks.expectedResult: Improved user experience during empty, loading, and error conditions with consistent, friendly UI.

outputPlan.description: Improved empty state component with friendly messages and actions
Loading skeleton component consistent with theme
Extension empty state with clear guidance
Extension sync and error status badge component

targetArtifacts: Improved empty, loading, and error states
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enhances user experience during non-ideal states with clear, friendly UI.

tasks.title: Integrate AI Tutor UI and interactions consistently across website and extension
tasks.description: Make AI Tutor more visible and useful by integrating it as a header chat icon, floating assistant button, messenger-style popup, AI recommendation card on dashboard, contextual help inside lessons, proactive tutor messages, and follow-up suggestions after completed tasks. Use friendly cards, avatar/icon, soft backgrounds, and clear action buttons. Ensure AI Tutor tone and UI are consistent across website and extension. Implement example messages and proactive recommendations.
acceptanceCriteria: AI Tutor UI is accessible and visible on website and extension
AI Tutor messages use friendly, personalized tone
AI Tutor proactive recommendations appear contextually
AI Tutor UI uses shared components and theme tokens
AI Tutor features remain functional and integrated
tasks.expectedResult: Consistent, friendly, and visible AI Tutor UI integrated across website and extension, enhancing user guidance and motivation.

outputPlan.description: Improved AI Tutor chat UI with proactive messages and friendly cards
Header chat icon component for AI Tutor
Extension AI Tutor entry point and message UI

metadata.inputContext: Reusable UI components and theme system
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enhances user engagement and guidance through consistent AI Tutor presence.

tasks.title: Audit and remove hard-coded styles and duplicated UI logic from website and extension
tasks.description: Perform a thorough audit of website and extension UI code to identify and remove all hard-coded colors, spacing, shadows, typography values, and repeated UI logic. Refactor code to use the centralized theme tokens and reusable components. Remove old unused UI components safely. Ensure no breaking changes and all existing features remain functional.
acceptanceCriteria: No hard-coded style values remain in UI components
Duplicated UI logic is consolidated into reusable components
Old unused UI components are removed safely
All existing features remain functional and tested
tasks.expectedResult: Clean, maintainable UI codebase with consistent styling and no duplication, ready for future enhancements.

outputPlan.description: Refactored UI components to remove hard-coded styles and duplication
Refactored extension UI components similarly

metadata.inputContext: Centralized theme system and reusable components
evidence: lint passes with no style warnings
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures maintainable, scalable UI codebase aligned with design system.

tasks.title: Test redesigned website and extension flows on desktop and mobile
tasks.description: Perform comprehensive testing of redesigned website and extension flows including landing page, onboarding, dashboard, study plan generation, today's plan, AI Tutor usage, vocabulary saving and review, progress viewing, settings, theme switching, extension installation, popup usage, selected text actions, AI Tutor in extension, auto-highlight, and sync status. Test on desktop and mobile devices, including dynamic and restricted pages. Confirm no UI breakage or regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: All website and extension flows function correctly on desktop and mobile
No UI breakage or layout issues observed
Extension does not break host websites
Auto-highlight and AI Tutor features work as expected
Sync status and error states display correctly
tasks.expectedResult: Validated, production-ready website and extension with polished UX/UI and no regressions.

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures the redesigned product is stable, functional, and ready for release.
